description: State document, Fatimid period. Petition or report to a vizier (beginning only), possibly under al-ʿAḍid (see line 4, where the blessing uses the verb ʿaḍada; thanks to Lara Balaa for this observation, though this blessing was also used for earlier viziers, see for example T-S Ar.39.304 (PGPID 20876), fol. 1v, l. 4). MR/ASE.
tags: Arabic script, Report, DIMME, Petition, lost archive
description_he: מסמך מדינה, תקופה פאטימית. עתירה/דוח לוזיר (רק ההתחלה נשמרה), ייתכן מתקופת אל-עאדד. ברכה בשורה 4 כוללת הפועל 'עדד'.
